verdict.reason: Two issues: (1) Single test bundles multiple independent behavioral assertions (project_id non-empty, dev-phase counts, review-phase counts) — a failure in one hides the others; (2) The slice's defining behavior — that abandoned items are surfaced as a distinct count rather than dropped or folded into done — is never exercised. No work item is driven into Abandoned status, so the test would pass even if the implementation hardcoded abandoned=0. Fix: split into focused tests and add a scenario that creates an abandoned item and asserts abandoned>0.
